problem id: e52fb8bd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  00100000 -> 00000000
  11111110 -> 11011011
  10111111 -> 11110110
  00110110 -> 11000000
  11010101 -> 00010010
  10010101 -> 00010010
  11101101 -> 10110101
  00001100 -> 00000000
  10010001 -> 00000010

query: 11011101
predicted answer: 00110011
